'''dhagubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focuslessness|focuslessness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focuslessness|focuslessness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhagubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhægibith|dhægibith]] || [[word:dhægibij|dhægibij]] || [[word:dhægibish|dhægibish]] || [[word:dhægibi|dhægibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagugubuth|dhagugubuth]] || [[word:dhagugubuj|dhagugubuj]] || [[word:dhagugubush|dhagugubush]] || [[word:dhagugubu|dhagugubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagubuth|dhagubuth]] || [[word:dhagubuj|dhagubuj]] || [[word:dhagubush|dhagubush]] || [[word:dhagubu|dhagubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagufbuth|dhagufbuth]] || [[word:dhagufbuj|dhagufbuj]] || [[word:dhagufbush|dhagufbush]] || [[word:dhagufbuf|dhagufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhagubuthu|dhagubuthu]] || [[word:dhagubuju|dhagubuju]] || [[word:dhagubushu|dhagubushu]] || [[word:dhagubuku|dhagubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhagubuth|dhagubuth]] || [[word:dhagubuj|dhagubuj]] || [[word:dhagubush|dhagubush]] || [[word:dhagubu|dhagubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhagubuthul|dhagubuthul]] || [[word:dhagubujul|dhagubujul]] || [[word:dhagubushul|dhagubushul]] || [[word:dhagubukul|dhagubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhagubuthuthu|dhagubuthuthu]] || [[word:dhagubujuju|dhagubujuju]] || [[word:dhagubushushu|dhagubushushu]] || [[word:dhagubuku|dhagubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhagubuthun|dhagubuthun]] || [[word:dhagubujun|dhagubujun]] || [[word:dhagubushun|dhagubushun]] || [[word:dhagubukun|dhagubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhagubuthuoro|dhagubuthuoro]] || [[word:dhagubujuoro|dhagubujuoro]] || [[word:dhagubushuoro|dhagubushuoro]] || [[word:dhagubukuoro|dhagubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
